description: fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric. This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its colour patterning. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric caressing your skin.  Approximate Length: 180 cmRed stole made of silk and cotton blended fabricCheck patterning on the stoleTassels on the edgesWash careDry clean only
